items.span: The staff are good always have smile on their face.

items.span: Great hotel at the Mekong river.
Rooms with balcony and stunning view.

the staff were extremely helpful and friendly.
our group of 5 enjoyed the choices at the breakfast buffet which included Pho!

the staff is well-trained, and the warm response was evident.
